title: NDAYAMBAJE v. UBUSHINJACYAHA
text:
NDAYAMBAJE v. UBUSHINJACYAHA
[Rwanda URUKIKO RW’UBUJURIRE– RPAA 00172/2025/CA (Kanyange, P.J.,) 28
Ugushyingo 2025]
Amategeko agenga imiburanishirrize y’imanza nshinjabyaha – Icyaha cyo gusambanya umwana
– Gushidikanywa kw’ibimenyetso – Kugira ngo Umucamanza afate icyemezo gihamya icyaha,
agomba kuba afite ibimenyetso bihamya nta gushidikanya (preuves à conviction au-delà de tout
doute raisonnable) ko ushinjwa ariwe wakoze icyaha, Umucamanza agomba gusesengurana
ubushishozi uruhurirane rw’ibimenyetso, agahamya ushinjwa icyaha mu gihe gusa asanga nta
wundi mwanzuro wagerwaho n’isesengura yakoze uretse iryo gusanisha uwakoze icyaha n’icyaha
cyakozwe.
Incamake y’ikibazo: Uwitwa Nyiraminani Marie Jeanne yatanze ikirego mu Bugenzacyaha
avuga ko mu bihe bitandukanye mu mwaka wa 2020 umugabo we Ndayambaje Emmanuel
yasambanyije umwana wabo w’umukobwa w’imyaka 12 witwa N.B., bituma uregwa atangira
gukurikiranwa.
Nyuma y’iperereza, Ubushinjacyaha bwamureze mu Rukiko Rwisumbuye rwa Gasabo icyaha cyo
gusambanya umwana, bushingiye ku mvugo za N.B, iza nyina n’iz’umutangabuhamya no kuri
raporo ya muganga, bumusabira igifungo cya burundu. Uregwa yaburanye ahakana icyaha.
Urukiko rwaciye urubanza, maze rusanga hari ibimenyetso bitandukanye bihamya Uregwa icyaha
akurikiranweho cyo gusambanya umwana we, ariko kuba atarangije uwo mwana uretse kumutera
indwara nayo yakize (trichomonus vaginalis) byamubera impamvu nyoroshyacyaha, maze
rumuhanisha igifungo cy’imyaka makumyabiri n’itanu (25).
Ndayambaje yajuriye mu Rukiko Rukuru avuga ko yahamijwe icyaha atakoze, kandi ko
ibimenyetso Ubushinjacyaha bwatanze bivuguruzanya, asaba uru rukiko gushingira kuri raporo ya
muganga kuko imurenganura. Ubushinjacyaha bwasubije buvuga ko ubujurire bwe nta shingiro
bufite, kuko ibimenyetso byashingiweho bimuhamya icyaha.
Urukiko Rukuru rwaciye urubanza maze rwemeza ko Ndayambaje ahamijwe icyaha hashingiwe
ku bimenyetso bitandukanye, rwemeza kandi ko kuba raporo ya muganga igaragaza ko umwana
agifite akarangabusugi atari ikimenyetso cy’uko atasambanyijwe nta shingiro bifite kuko umwana
yasanganwe indwara yandurira mu mibonano mpuzabitsina, bityo ko raporo ya muganga
itamushinjura nkuko uregwa abivuga, maze hagumaho igifungo cy’imyaka 25 Ndayambaje
yahanishijwe.
Ndayambaje Emmanuel yajuririye Urukiko rw’Ubujurire. Uwo munsi Urukiko rwasabye
Ubushinjacyaha gukora iperereza bukabaza abatangabuhamya batandukanye, mu myanzuro
y’ubujurire no mu miburanire, Ndayambaje n’umwunganira bavuga ko Urukiko rwamuhamije
icyaha rwirengagije ko umunsi bivugwa icyaha cyakoreweho atari ahari, ko rwirengagije
amakimbirane uregwa yari asanzwe afitanye n’umugore we, kandi ko rwashingiye kuri raporo ya
muganga kandi itagaragaza ko N.B. yasambanyijwe, bityo asaba kugirwa umwere.

Uhagararariye Ubushinjacyaha avuga ko izo mpamvu z’ubujurire nta shingiro zifite, kuko uregwa
yahawe umwanya wo kwisobanura ku bimenyetso bimushinja icyaha, avuga ko n’ubwo uregwa
avuga ko uwo munsi yaba ataririwe mu rugo, ariko yaratashye, kandi ko raporo ya muganga
igaragaza ko umwana yasambayijwe.
Uhagarariye Ubushinjacyaha avuga kandi ko itegeko ritakoreshejwe nabi nkuko Ndayambaje
avuga kuko yahawe umwanya wo kwisobanura ku bimenyetso bimushinja icyaha, birimo
n’imvugo z’umugore we, bityo ko Urukiko nta makosa rwakoze kuko arirwo ruha agaciro
ibikubiye mu buhamya bwatanzwe n’ababajijwe.
Incamake y’icyemezo: Kugira ngo Umucamanza afate icyemezo gihamya icyaha, agomba kuba
afite ibimenyetso bihamya nta gushidikanya (preuves à conviction au-delà de tout doute
raisonnable) ko ushinjwa ariwe wakoze icyaha, Umucamanza agomba gusesengurana ubushishozi
uruhurirane rw’ibimenyetso, agahamya ushinjwa icyaha mu gihe gusa asanga nta wundi
mwanzuro wagerwaho n’isesengura yakoze uretse iryo gusanisha uwakoze icyaha n’icyaha
cyakozwe.
Ubujurire bufite ishingiro.
Uregwa agizwe umwere akaba agomba kurekurwa.
Amategeko yashingiweho:
Itegeko Nº 027/2019 ryo ku wa 19/09/2019 ryerekeye imiburanishirize y’imanza
z’inshinjabyaha, ingingo ya 111.
Imanza zifashishijwe:
Urubanza RPAA 00737/2021/CA, rw’ Ubushinjacyaha na Uwayisaba Habimana Antoine ,
rwaciwe n’urukiko rw’ubujurire ku wa 16/12/2022;
Urubanza RPAA 01340/2024/CA rw’ Ubushinjacyaha na Bizimana Aloys, rwaciwe n’Urukiko
rw’Ubujurire ku wa 30/10/2025.
Urubanza
I. IMITERERE Y’URUBANZA
[1] Nyiraminani Marie Jeanne yatanze ikirego mu Bugenzacyaha avuga ko mu bihe
bitandukanye mu mwaka wa 2020 umugabo we Ndayambaje Emmanuel yasambanyije umwana
wabo w’umukobwa w’imyaka 12 witwa N.B.1, ko yabimenye ku wa 22/05/2020 ubwo yinjiraga
mu nzu agasanga umwana ahagaze imbere y'igitanda aho se yari aryamye arimo gushyira ukuboko
mu ijipo ye amubwira ngo namwegere yumve uko ibintu bimeze, amwikanze ahita abwira uwo
mwana ngo asohoke, nyuma aza kumubwira ko igihe cyose yabaga ari kumwe na se bari bonyine
yamusambanyaga, bituma Ndayambaje Emmanuel atangira gukurikiranwa.
1 Yahawe iri zina kuko ari umwana

[2] Nyuma y’iperereza, Ubushinjacyaha bwamureze mu Rukiko Rwisumbuye rwa Gasabo
icyaha cyo gusambanya umwana, bushingiye ku mvugo za N.B, iza nyina n’iz’umutangabuhamya
no kuri raporo ya muganga, bumusabira igifungo cya burundu.
[3] Ndayambaje Emmanuel yireguye avuga ko atemera icyaha, ko ari akagambane k’umugore
we gashingiye ku kuba yarabyaranye n’undi mugabo, ko kandi iby’uko yamubonye ashyira
ukuboko mu ijipo y’umwana atari ukuri kuko yari yajyanye na Twagirayezu gusakara inzu i
Nyamata, naho ibyo umutangabuhamya yavuze akaba yarabibwiwe n’umugore we.
[4] Urukiko rwaciye urubanza RP 00813/2020/TGI/GSBO ku wa 05/11/2021, rusanga hari
ibimenyetso bihamya Ndayambaje Emmanuel icyaha akurikiranweho bigizwe n’imvugo za N.B.
wasobanuye ko se yamusambanyirije mu gihuru inshuro eshanu, amusambanyiriza no mu rugo
ubwo yari yakubise nyina akagenda, ko kandi kubibwira nyina byatewe n’uko yari yamusanze
ahagaze imbere y’igitanda se yari aryamyeho, amaze kuzamura ijipo ngo akore ku gitsina nyina
ahita yinjira; imvugo za nyina w’umwana wasobanuye ko yasanze umugabo we arimo gushyira
akaboko mu ijipo y’umwana amukora ku gitsina, imvugo z’umutangabuhamya Mupfasoni Odette
(umujyanama w’ubuzima) wavuze ko yabajije N.B. akamwemerera ko se yamusambanyije na
raporo ya muganga igaragaza ko N.B. yanduye indwara zandurira mu mibonano mpuzabitsina.
Rwasanze kuba Ndayambaje Emmanuel atarangije uwo mwana uretse kumutera indwara nayo
yakize (trichomonus vaginalis) byamubera impamvu nyoroshyacyaha, rumuhanisha igifungo
cy’imyaka makumyabiri n’itanu (25).
[5] Ndayambaje Emmanuel yajuriye mu Rukiko Rukuru avuga ko yahamijwe icyaha atakoze,
ko ibimenyetso Ubushinjacyaha bwatanze bivuguruzanya, ko ahubwo hashingirwa kuri raporo ya
muganga kuko imurenganura.
[6] Ubushinjacyaha bwasubije ko ubujurire bwe nta shingiro bufite, kuko ibimenyetso
byashingiweho bimuhamya icyaha, birimo imvugo za N.B. umushinja kumusambanya n’imvugo
za nyina, ko kandi raporo ya muganga itamushinjura kuko igaragaza ko umwana yasambanyijwe
bitewe n’uko yasanganywe indwara zandurira mu mibonano mpuzabitsina.
[7] Urukiko rwaciye urubanza RPA 01857/2021/HC/KIG ku wa 09/01/2025, rusanga
Ndayambaje yarahamijwe icyaha hashingiwe ku bimenyetso birimo imvugo z’umwana
wasambanyijwe, imvugo za nyina n’iz’umutangabuhamya umwana yabibwiye, ko ntacyo anenga
urubanza yajuririye kuko n’ibyo avuga ko icyaha gikorwa yari i Nyamata aho yari yabonye ikiraka
cyo gusakara inzu, nta kimenyetso abigaragariza, mu gihe umwana we yasobanuye uko byagenze
akanavuga ko yamusambanyije inshuro nyinshi. Rwasanze kandi iby’uko ari akagambane
k’umugore we nta shingiro bifite kuko atagaragaza ikibazo bagiranye n’urwego yagishyikirije.
[8] Rwasanze kandi kuba raporo ya muganga igaragaza ko umwana agifite akarangabusugi
atari ikimenyetso cy’uko atasambanyijwe harebwe ibiteganywa n’ingingo ya 133 y’Itegeko
Nº68/2018 ryo ku wa 30/08/2018 riteganya ibyaha n’ibihano muri rusange2; ko kuba umwana
yaravuze ko se yagiye asunika buhoro buhoro amubwira ko ntacyo aba, nyuma akumva ibintu
by’ibizi bimumenetseho, no kuba yarasanganwe indwara yandurira mu mibonano mpuzabitsina,
bivuze ko iyo raporo itamushinjura, ko kandi ibyo avuga ko umwana ashobora kuba yaranduriye
2 Gukora ikindi gikorwa cyose ku mubiri w’umwana hagamijwe ishimishamubiri

iyo ndwara kuri toilettes nta shingiro bifite, kuko umwana yavuze ibyo yamukoreye. Rwemeje
rero ko hagumaho igifungo cy’imyaka 25 Ndayambaje Emmanuel yahanishijwe.
[9] Ndayambaje Emmanuel yajuririye Urukiko rw’Ubujurire, urubanza rwandikwa kuri RPAA
00172/2025/CA, ruhabwa itariki yo kuburanishwa yo ku wa 07/10/2025, uwo munsi ruburanishwa
yunganiwe na Me Micomyiza Lilian, Ubushinjacyaha buhagarariwe na Sibomana Stanislas
Umushinjacyaha ku rwego rw’Igihugu. Uwo munsi Urukiko rwasabye Ubushinjacyaha gukora
iperereza bukabaza abatangabuhamya barimo Ndayisenga Pascal, Umukuru w’Umudugudu wa
Kayenzi witwa Obed, Uwimana Jean Pierre na Ndayizeye Arani, naho N.B. na nyina
bagahamagazwa n’Urukiko. Rwongeye kuburanishwa ku wa 19/11/2025, N.B. na nyina batitabye
kuko batabonetse, Ubushinjacyaha busobanura ibyavuye mu iperereza bwakoze, Ndayambaje
Emmanuel n’umwunganira bahabwa umwanya wo kugira icyo babivugaho.
[10] Mu myanzuro y’ubujurire no mu miburanire, Ndayambaje Emmanuel n’umwunganira
bavuga ko Urukiko rwamuhamije icyaha rwirengagije ko umunsi bivugwa icyaha cyakoreweho
atari ahari, runirengagiza amakimbirane asanzwe afitanye n’umugore we, ntirwamuhuza na
Nyiraminani Marie Jeanne umurega ngo banyomozanye, runashingira kuri raporo ya muganga
kandi itagaragaza ko N.B. yasambanyijwe.
[11] Uhagararariye Ubushinjacyaha avuga ko izo mpamvu z’ubujurire nta shingiro zifite, kuko
yahawe umwanya wo kwisobanura ku bimenyetso bimushinja icyaha, birimo n’imvugo za
Nyiraminani Marie Jeanne, ko kandi n’ubwo uwo munsi yaba ataririwe mu rugo, ariko yatashye,
ko n’iby’amakimbirane avuga nta bimenyetso yabitangiye, kandi ko raporo ya muganga igaragaza
ko umwana yasambayijwe.
[12] Muri uru rubanza ikigomba gusuzumwa ni ukumenya niba hari ibimenyetso Urukiko
rwirengagije bigatuma Ndayambaje Emmanuel ahamwa n’icyaha atakoze, no kumenya niba
rwarashingiye kuri raporo ya muganga kandi itagaragaza ko umwana yasambanyijwe.
II. ISESENGURA RY’IKIBAZO KIRI MU RUBANZA
Kumenya niba hari ibimenyetso Urukiko rwirengagije bigatuma Ndayambaje Emmanuel
ahamwa n’icyaha atakoze, no kumenya niba rwarashingiye kuri raporo ya muganga kandi
itagaragaza ko umwana yasambanyijwe
[13] Ndayambaje n’umwunganira bavuga ko Urukiko rwakoresheje mu buryo butari bwo
ingingo ya 87 y’Itegeko Nº 062/2024 ryo ku wa 20/06/2024 rigenga ibimenyetso3, kuko atahujwe
na Nyiraminani Marie Jeanne umurega ngo banyomozanye kandi yarabisabye kuva mu
Bugenzacyaha ntibikorwe, ko rero uru Rukiko rwamutumiza mu rwego rwo kugaragaza ukuri.
Banavuga ko hirengagijwe ko umunsi bavuga icyaha cyakorewe atari ahari kuko yari yabonye
ikiraka cyo gusakara inzu i Nyamata, kandi ko yabitangiye ibimenyetso ntibyitabweho, bityo ko
Urukiko rwakora iperereza ryaho atuye rukamenya ukuri.
3 Iyo ngingo iteganya ko: “mu rubanza nshinjabyaha, ikimenyetso gishingira ku mpamvu zose z’ibyabaye
n’ibyemejwe n’amategeko, ababuranyi bapfa kuba barahawe umwanya wo kubijyaho impaka”.

[14] Bavuga ko kandi Urukiko rwirengagije ibisobanuro n’ibimenyetso yatanze bigaragaza
amakimbirane yari asanzwe afitanye na Nyiraminani Marie Jeanne (babanaga batarasezeranye)
ashingiye ku kuba yarabyaranye n'undi mugabo no kuba yaramubwiye ko akeka ko hari undi
mugabo witwa Pierre basambanaga, amurega ashaka kumwihimuraho kuko batumvikanaga, ko
rero Urukiko rwirengagije gukora iperereza yasabye kuri ayo makimbirane, runirengagiza
ibiteganywa n'ingingo ya 4 y'ltegeko Nº 062/2024 ryo ku wa 20/06/2024 rigenga ibimenyetso4 5.
[15] Bakomeza bavuga ko Urukiko rwirengagije ko yaba imvugo z'umwana, iza nyina
n’ubuhamya bwa Umupfasoni Odette, byose bikomoka kuri nyina w’umwana hakiyongeraho
n'ibyo bibazo by'amakimbirane yagaragaje, ubwabyo bikaba bitera gushidikanya, kandi ko
Nyiraminani Marie Jeanne abazwa yavuze ko atazi igihe umwana yasambanyirijwe ariko uwo
yahaye amakuru witwa Umupfasoni Odette we mu ibazwa rye akavuga ko yabwiwe na
Nyiraminani Marie Jeanne ko yasambanyijwe ku itariki ya 26/05/2020, hakaba rero harimo
kuvuguruzanya gukabije, n’imvugo z'umwana zikaba zishingiye ku marangamutima ya nyina.
[16] Ku bijyanye na raporo ya muganga, bavuga ko yashingiweho kandi igaragaza ko umwana
atasambanyijwe, akaba rero akwiye kugirwa umwere dore ko n’indwara ya trichomonus
yasanganwe umwana nta kigaragaza ko ari we wayimwanduje kuko atapimwe kandi mu
mwanzuro wa muganga yagaragaje ko ibizamini byakozwe nta kidasanzwe cyagaragaye kugeza
no ku karangabusugi ke, ko kandi iyo ndwara idaterwa no gusambanywa gusa, ko ahubwo ari
nyina wamwoheje kuko atari gusambanya umwana inshuro 5 ngo raporo ya muganga igaragaze
ko umwana agifite akarangabusugi kandi ko atigeze akomereka.
[17] Ku byavuzwe n’ababajijwe mu iperereza ryakozwe n’Ubushinjacyaha, Ndayambaje
Emmanuel n’umwunganira bavuga ko iyo yabaga yagiranye ibibazo n’umugore we, Ndayisenga
Pascal ari we wazaga kubikemura, kandi ko amakimbirane yari afitanye n’umugore we yari
asanzwe kuko yagayaga umushahara w’umugabo we akajya mu buraya, kandi ko ayo
makimbiranye no mu nzego z’iperereza yayagaragaje, uretse ko atayashyize mu buyobozi kuko
yumvaga ko kuba umwana yaravukiye iwe, ari uwe, bityo ko imvugo ya Ndayisenga Pascal
yazashingirwaho kuko ariwe wari uzi icyo kibazo.
[18] Basoza bavuga ko hashingirwa ku ngingo ya 111 y'Itegeko Nº 027/2019 ryo ku wa
19/09/2019 ryerekeye imiburanishirize y'imanza z'inshinjabyaha, iteganya ko gushidikanya
birengera uregwa n’ingingo ya 4 n’iya 6 z’Itegeko Nº 062/2024 ryo ku wa 20/06/2024 rigenga
ibimenyetso56, Ndayambaje Emmanuel akagirwa umwere.
[19] Uhagarariye Ubushinjacyaha avuga ko ingingo ya 87 y’Itegeko Nº 062/2024 ryo ku wa
20/06/2024 ryavuzwe haruguru itakoreshejwe nabi kuko Ndayambaje Emmanuel yahawe
umwanya wo kwisobanura ku bimenyetso bimushinja icyaha, birimo n’imvugo z’umugore we,
akaba rero atari ngombwa ko atumizwa kuko ivuguruzanya hagati yabo atari ngombwa kubera ko
4 Iyo ngingo iteganya ko: "Uwiregura agaragaza ikimenyetso gishyigikira ukwiregura kwe".
5 Ingingo ya 4 y’iryo tegeko iteganya ko: “(1) Urega cyangwa utanze ikibazo agaragaza ikimenyetso cy’ibyo aregera
cyangwa asaba. Uwiregura agaragaza ikimenyetso gishyigikira ukwiregura kwe”, naho ingingo ya 6 y’iryo tegeko
iteganya ko: “Urwego rufite ububasha rufata icyemezo ku byo rwashyikirijwe hakurikijwe ubwoko bw’ibimenyetso
bihuje na kamere y’ikiburanwa cyangwa y’ikibazo kiri mu mpaka”.

n’ubwo yamenyekanishije icyaha, atari we urega ahubwo hareze Ubushinjacyaha, ko rero Urukiko
nta makosa rwakoze kuko arirwo ruha agaciro ibikubiye mu buhamya bwatanzwe n’ababajijwe67.
[20] Naho ku bivugwa na Ndayambaje Emmanuel ko atari ahari umunsi bivugwa ko icyaha
cyakozwe, Uhagarariye Ubushinjacyaha avuga ko nta shingiro bifite, kuko n’iyo yari kuba yagiye
mu kazi nk’uko abivuga, bitavuze ko uwo munsi atatashye iwe, kuko gushyira intoki mu ijipo
y’umwana we bitamaze umunsi wose, bityo ko atari ngombwa gukora iperereza asaba kuko
atagaragaza uwo yari yagiye gukoraho akazi, kandi n’iyo ahaba atakwemeza ko yagiye gukora
akahaguma ntatahe mu rugo rwe.
[21] Uhagarariye Ubushinjacyaha avuga kandi ko ibivugwa na Ndayambaje Emmanuel ko yari
afitanye amakimbirane n’umugore we bigatuma amugambanira nta shingiro bifite, kuko nta kibazo
na kimwe yagaragaje baba baragiranye ngo avuge n’urwego yagishikirije, iperereza asaba akaba
atari ngombwa kuko atabashije kugaragaza abo ryakorwaho (uwabyaranye n’umugore we ndetse
n’umwana babyaranye uwo ariwe), cyane ko ubwo yabazwaga mu Bugenzacyaha yavugaga ko
bapfa ko yamubajije umugabo washakaga kumusambanya akahukana, ageze mu Rukiko aba ariho
azana iby’uko bapfa ko yabyaranye n’undi mugabo ariko akaba atabitangira ibimenyetso.
[22] Ku bijyanye na raporo ya muganga bavuga ko igaragaza ko N.B. atasambanyijwe,
uhagarariye Ubushinjacyaha avuga ko raporo ya muganga ari kimwe mu bimenyetso
bishingirwaho hemezwa ko umwana yasambanyijwe ariko atariyo nshinganwa, kuko icyaha cyo
gusambanya umwana gikorwa mu buryo butandukanye nk’uko biteganywa n’ingingo ya 14
y’Itegeko Nº 059/2023 ryo ku wa 04/12/2023 rihindura Itegeko Nº 68/2018 ryo ku wa 30/08/2018
riteganya ibyaha n’ibihano muri rusange78, ibyo rero umwana yavuze ko se yagiye asunika buhuro
buhoro, akumva ibintu by’ibizi bimumenekaho, bihura n’iyi ngingo, na nyina w’umwana akaba
yaravuze ko yamubonye yamushyize intoki mu ijipo; no kuba ataratakaje akarangabusugi cyangwa
ngo akomereke bikaba bitavuze ko atamusambanyije hakoreshejwe uburyo bwo kumukozaho
igitsina akamurangirizaho kuko umwana avuga ko yamumenyeho ibintu by’ibizi.
[23] Ku birebana n’ibyavuzwe n’ababajijwe mu iperereza, uhagarariye Ubushinjacyaha avuga
ko umutangabuhamya witwa Ndayisenga yavuze ko aziranye na Ndayambaje Emmanuel, ko
yamenyaga ikibazo cye ariwe ukimubwiye, ariko ko ntaho yigeze aburana n’umugore we, na
Ndayizera aba ariko abivuga naho uwitwa Uwimana Jean Pierre we avuga ko icyo azi ari uko
babanaga mu makimbirane ashingiye ku bukene. Asoza avuga ko asanga umugore atari kugereka
icyaha ku mugabo we kandi ariwe wari utunze urugo, ahubwo ikibazo cyari gihari ari ubukene
kubera bana benshi.
6 Babishingira ku ngingo ya 53 y’Itegeko N° 062/2024 ryo ku wa 20/06/2024 rigenga ibimenyetso iteganya ko:
“Urwego rufite ububasha rusuzuma ukwemerwa cyangwa ukutemerwa n’agaciro by’ikimenyetso gishingiye ku
buhamya. Ntirwita ku mubare w’abatangabuhamya, ahubwo rwita cyane ku bumenyi bw’ibyabaye no ku
budakemwa bw’ubuhamya batanga”.
7 Iyo ngingo mu gace ka b n’igika cya (3) iteganya ko: « (1) « Umuntu ukorera ku mwana kimwe mu bikorwa
bishingiye ku gitsina bikurikira, aba akoze icyaha: […] (b)gushyira urugingo urwo ari rwo rwose rw’umubiri
w’umuntu mu gitsina cyangwa mu kibuno cy’umwana; […] (3) gukora ikindi gikorwa cyose ku mubiri w’umwana
hagamijwe ishimishamubiri. Iyo gusambanya umwana byakorewe ku mwana uri munsi y’imyaka 14 igihano kiba
igifungo cya burundu.

UKO URUKIKO RUBIBONA
[24] Kumenya niba hari ibimenyetso Urukiko rwirengagije bigatuma Ndayambaje Emmanuel
ahamwa n’icyaha atakoze, no kumenya niba rwarashingiye kuri raporo ya muganga kandi
itagaragaza ko umwana yasambanyijwe.
[25] Ku bijyanye n’ibishingirwaho ngo hemezwe ko uregwa ahamwa n’icyaha byasobanuwe
n’Urukiko rw’Ubujurire mu manza zitandukanye harimo urubanza RPAA 00737/2021/CA89, no
mu zindi manza zaciwe nyuma yarwo harimo urubanza RPAA 01340/2024/CA9, muri izo manza
Urukiko rukaba rwaremeje ko kugira ngo Umucamanza afate icyemezo gihamya icyaha, agomba
kuba afite ibimenyetso bihamya nta gushidikanya (preuves à conviction au-delà de tout doute
raisonnable) ko ushinjwa ariwe wakoze icyaha, ko Umucamanza agomba gusesengurana
ubushishozi uruhurirane rw’ibimenyetso, agahamya ushinjwa icyaha mu gihe gusa asanga nta
wundi mwanzuro wagerwaho n’isesengura yakoze uretse iryo gusanisha uwakoze icyaha n’icyaha
cyakozwe.
[26] Nk’uko urubanza rujuririrwa rubigaragaza, Ndayambaje Emmanuel yahamijwe icyaha cyo
gusambanya umwana hashingiwe ku mvugo z’uwo mwana wasambanyijwe, iza nyina
n’ubuhamya bwa Umupfasoni Odette wavuze ibyo yabwiwe n’uwo mwana, rusobanura ko raporo
ya muganga itamushinjura kuko hashingiwe ku byo amategeko ateganya kuba agifite
akarangabusugi atari ikimenyetso cy’uko atasambanyijwe, ko n’ibyo avuga ko icyaha gikorwa
atari ahari nta kimenyetso abigaragariza, kandi ko umwana yavuze ko yamusambanyije inshuro
nyinshi, ko n’iby’akagambane k’umugore we nta shingiro bifite kuko atagaragaza ikibazo
bagiranye n’urwego yagishyikirije.
[27] Ku birebana n’imvugo za N.B., mu nyandikomvugo yakoreye mu Bugenzacyaha,
yasobanuye uburyo se yamusambanyaga, ko bari bagiye guhaha bageze ku gihuru se aryama hasi
we amuryamisha imbere, amubwira gushyira akaguru k’ibumoso hejuru y’itako rye aramubwira
ngo areke akoze igitsina ku gitsina cye, arongera aramubwira ngo areke asunike ntababara nabyo
arabikora asunika buhoro buhoro ageze aho abikora cyane, maze umwana yumva ibintu by’ibizi
biraje amuhanaguza igitambaro yari yifubitse, ko yari amaze kumusambanyiriza mu gihuru
inshuro 5, ku nshuro ya nyuma amusambanyiriza mu nzu nijoro nyina yagiye se yamukubise,
amushyira ku buriri amwambura imyenda aramusambanya, ko kandi yari yaramubujije kubivuga,
kugirango abibwire nyina bikaba byaratewe n’uko yamutumye inyanya mu nzu, ageze yo se
aramuhamagara ngo amusange aho yari aryamye ahagarara imbere y’igitanda aramubwira ngo
azane arebe uko bya bindi bimeze, atangiye kuzamura ijipo ngo akore ku gitsina cye nyina aba
arinjije arabireka.
[28] Ku birebana n’imvugo za nyina w’umwana, abazwa mu Bugenzacyaha yavuze ko mu bihe
bitandukanye umugabo we Ndayambaje Emmanuel yasambanyije umwana wabo, abimenya ku
wa 22/05/2020 asanze uwo mwana ahagaze hafi y’igitanda aho se yari aryamye arimo gushyira
ukuboko mu ijipo ye amubwira ngo amwegere yumve uko bimeze, amwikanze arabireka,
8 Reba urubanza RPAA 00737/2021/CA rwaciwe ku wa 16/12/2022, haburana Ubushinjacyaha na Uwayisaba
Habimana Antoine igika cya 16-17.
9 Reba urubanza Nº RPAA 01340/2024/CA rwaciwe ku wa 30/10/2025, haburana Ubushinjacyaha na Bizimana
Aloys igika cya 25.

barangije imirimo yicaza umwana amubaza neza ibyo yabonye arimo na se, amubwira ko iyo bari
bonyine amwicaza ku bibero agashyira igitsina mu cye yarangiza agafata akenda akamuhanagura,
anamubwira ko yakundaga kumusambanya bagiye guhaha, akamwicaza mu gihuru kiri hafi y’aho
baca, kandi ko yabimukoreye inshuro nyinshi, ko amaze kubyumva yananiwe kubyakira ajya
kugisha inama umujyanama w’ubuzima, ari nawe watanze amakuru Ndayambaje Emmanuel
agafatwa.
[29] Naho mu nyandikomvugo ya Mupfasoni Odette yakoreye mu Bugenzacyaha, yavuze ko ku
wa 26/05/2020 nyina wa N.B. yaje kumureba azanye n’umugabo we, amusaba ko baganira
biherereye akamugira inama, amubwira ko umugabo we yasambanyije umwana wabo w’imyaka
12, ko umwana we yabimubwiye ku wa 22/05/2020, icyo gihe ngo akaba yari yicaje abana be
b’abakobwa abaganiriza ababwira ko ari bibi ko umukobwa w’umwangavu bamusambanya, N.B.
ahita amubwira ko we bamusambanyije, bituma amujyana hanze amubaza uwamuhohoteye, avuga
ko ari se, ko yamubwiye ko nabivuga azamutema naho natabivuga azamugurira ikanzu nziza,
asaba nyina w’uwo mwana kumumwoherereza ngo amwibarize, umwana ahageze aramubaza,
amwemerera ko se yamusambanyije inshuro zigeze kuri 6, ko inshuro ya mbere bagiye guhaha
bageze ku gihuru se aravuga ngo naze amubwire, ahita amwambura imyenda aramusambanya,
inshuro ya kabiri ngo nyina yari yagiye guhinga aramufata aramukikira maze aramusambanya,
inshuro ya 3 biba nyina yarahukanye bikomeza gutyo no ku zindi nshuro.
[30] Mu bimenyetso byashingiweho hari kandi raporo ya muganga igaragaza ko akarangabusugi
k’uwo mwana kari kagihari (hymen present), mu gitsina cye hajyamo urutoki rumwe ruto (1 little
finger), kandi ko yari afite uburwayi (trichomonus vaginalis), mu mwanzuro we muganga akaba
yaragaragaje ko isuzuma ry’imyanya ndangagitsina ye ryagaragaje ko nta kidasanzwe ryagaragaje.
[31] Muri dosiye harimo kandi inyandikomvugo y’umutangabuhamya Ndayisenga Pascal
wabajijwe n’Ubushinjacyaha ku wa 31/10/2025, avuga ko yakoranye na Ndayambaje Emmanuel
akazi k’ubwubatsi, akaba yari n’inshuti ye, ko Ndayambaje Emmanuel n’umugore we bakiba i
Ntunga aho babanje kuba bahoranaga amakimbirane ku buryo mu Mudugudu bari batuyemo bari
barabarambiwe, ko bijya gutangira byaturutse ku nzu yabo Ndayambaje Emmanuel yagurishije
akajya i Bugande, agaruka umugore we yarimukiye mu Bugesera barongera barasubirana, ariko
bagirana ikibazo cy’umwana wavutse umugabo ntiyamwemera avuga ko yamubyaranye
n’umugabo witwa Pierre bari baturanye, ariko ko icyo kibazo nta buyobozi bakibwiye kuko we
yabimenye nk’inshuti y’umuryango, kandi ko bakiganiriye ntibyanyura umugore wa Ndayambaje
kuko uwo mugabo yahoraga amushinja ko asambana na Pierre bigatuma mu rugo hahora
umwiryane.
[32] Undi mutangabuhamya wabajijwe n’Ubushinjacyaha witwa Ndayizeye Arani, yavuze ko
yakoranaga na Ndayambaje Emmanuel akazi k’ubufundi, ko hari umwana umugore wa
Ndayambaje yabyaye akavuga ko atari uwe, ariko ko uwo avuga ko bamubyaranye atamuzi, ko
yajyaga yumva Ndayambaje avugira kuri telefone ko afitanye amakimbirane n’umugore we kubera
ko yabyaye umwana utari uwe. Undi mutangabuhamya nawe witwa Uwimana Jean Pierre, avuga
ko Ndayambaje n’umugore bari bafite ubwumvikane buke bushingiye ku bukene ndetse n’abana
benshi kandi ko Ndayambaje atari azwi nabi ahubwo yitwaraga neza, ku buryo bumvise ibyo
aregwa batunguwe, anavuga ko iby’uko umugore we yaba yarabyaye umwana utari uwa
Ndayambaje yabyumvise bivugwa mu mvugo za gifundi ariko ko nta makuru arambuye abifiteho.

[33] Ku bivugwa na Ndayambaje Emmanuel n’umwuganira ko Urukiko rwakoresheje nabi
amategeko kuko atahujwe n’umugore we Nyiraminani Marie Jeanne ngo banyomozanye, Urukiko
rw’Ubujurire rurasanga kuba batarahujwe ngo banyomozanye atari inenge ku rubanza rujuririrwa
kuko nk’uko bigaragara mu myanzuro ye no mu miburanire mu rubanza rujuririrwa ntaho yasabye
ko yahamagazwa ngo Urukiko rubyirengagize, ndetse no muri uru Rukiko umugore we akaba
yarahamagajwe ariko ntiyaboneka, ikindi kandi imvugo ze zikaba zikubiye mu nyandikomvugo
ye yakorewe mu Bugenzacyaha kandi Ndayambaje Emmanuel akaba yarahawe umwanya wo
kwiregura ku byo aregwa no ku bimenyetso byashingiweho mu nkinko zabanje.
[34] Ku birebana n’amakimbirane Ndayambaje Emmanuel avuga ko yari afitanye n’umugore
we, bigaragara ko yagiye avuga ko ayo makimbirane ashigiye ku kuba yaramuciye inyuma
akabyarana n'undi mugabo, kandi ko yakekaga ko hari undi mugabo witwa Pierre basambanaga,
akavuga rero ko ayo makimbirane ari yo yatumye amurega ashaka kumwihimuraho.
[35] Urukiko rw’Ubujurire rurasanga n’ubwo mu rubanza rujuririrwa Urukiko rwavuze ko nta
bimenyetso Ndayambaje Emmanuel yatanze by’ayo makimbirane, abatangabuhamya babajijwe
n’Ubushinjacyaha mu iperereza ryatagetswe n’uru Rukiko, bagaragaje ko bazi iby’ayo
makimbirane kuko bavuze ko bahoranaga ubwumvikane buke bushingiye ku mwana umugore yari
yarabyaye Ndayambaje Emmanuel akavuga ko atari uwe, bityo ibyo bavuga ko yari afitanye
amakimbirane n’umugore we bikaba bifite ishingiro, ariko kuba bari bafite ibyo bapfa n’umugore
we bikaba bitashingirwaho byonyine ngo hemezwe ko atakoze icyaha cyo gusambanya umwana,
ahubwo hakwiye gusesengurwa n’ibindi bimenyetso byashingiweho kugirango hasuzumwe niba
byemeza nta gushidikanya ko yakoze icyaha akurikiranweho.
[36] Ku birebana n’ibindi bimenyetso byashingiweho, Ndayambaje Emmanuel n’umwunganira
banenga ko imvugo za N.B, iza nyina, n’iza Umupfasoni Odette zitera gushidikanya kandi ko
zivuguruzanya ku bijyanye n’igihe icyaha cyakorewe.
[37] Ku bijyanye no kuba imvugo za N.B., iza nyina, n’iza Umupfasoni Odette zitagombaga
gushingirwaho kuko zishidikanywaho kandi zikaba zivuguruzanya, Urukiko rw’Ubujurire
rurasanga nk’uko imvugo zabo zibigaragaza, umwana na nyina badahuza n’umutangabuhamya
Umupfasoni Odette ku bijyanye n’uburyo icyaha cyamenyekanye, kuko umwana avuga ko nyina
yabimenye ari uko amusanze ahagaze imbere y’igitanda se aryamye arimo kumukora mu ijipo, na
nyina akaba ariko yabisobanuye, mu gihe umutangabuhamya babibwiye avuga ko nyina wa N.B.
yabimenye ari uko yicaje abakobwa be akabaganiriza ababwira ko gusambanya abana b’abangavu
atari byiza, N.B. akamubwira ko we yasambanyijwe, nyina yamwihererana akamubwira ko se
amaze kumusambanya inshuro nyinshi. Na none kandi, ntibasobanura mu buryo bumwe inshuro
umwana yasambanyijwe, kuko Umupfasoni avuga ko hari igihe se yamusambanyije nyina yagiye
guhinga mu gihe umwana na nyina ntaho babivuze, kuko umwana avuga ko se yamusambanyirije
mu gihuru inshuro 5 naho inshuro ya nyuma amusambanyiriza mu nzu ubwo nyina yari yaragiye.
Ikindi kandi Umupfasoni akaba avuga ko umwana yamubwiye ko ubwo se yamusambanyaga
nyina adahari yari inshuro ya 3, mu gihe umwana yavuze ko se amusambanya nyina adahari ari ku
nshuro ya nyuma bivuze ko ari ku nshuro ya 6. Uko kutavuga ibintu kimwe bikaba rero bituma
imvugo zabo zitakwizerwa mu kugaragaza ukuri kw’ibyabaye.
[38] Ku bijyanye na raporo ya muganga, yaragaragaje ko umwana agifite akarangabusugi ko
n’ibindi byasuzumwe ku gitsina cye nta kidasanzwe byagaragaje. Urukiko rurasanga rero ibyo

raporo yagaragaje birebewe hamwe n’imvugo z’uwo mwana wavuze ko se yamusambanyije
inshuro 6, ko yabanje kumubwira ngo areke akoze igitsina cye ku cy’uwo mwana, akabikora,
akongera akamubwira ngo areke asunike ntababara ngo agasunika buhoro buhoro yageraho
akabikora cyane, akumva ibintu by’ibizi bije, nyina nawe akavuga ko umwana yamubwiye ko iyo
yabaga ari kumwe na se bonyine se yamwicazaga ku bibero agashyira igitsina mu cye, izo mvugo
zikaba zumvikanisha ko se yasambanyaga uwo mwana yashyize igitsina mu cye kandi kugeza
arangije icyo gikorwa, ibyo ariko bikaba bitera gushidikanya kuko ibyo umwana yavuze ko
yakorerwaga bitari kuba ngo muganga abure kugira icyo abona kidasanzwe ku gitsine cye, cyane
cyane ko yasanze n’akarangabusugi ari kazima.
[39] Urukiko rw’Ubujurire rurasanga kandi kuba muganga yarasanze umwana afite uburwayi
(trichomonus vaginalis), bitashingirwaho hemezwa ko byatewe n’uko Ndayambaje Emmanuel
yamusambanyije, kuko nawe atapimwe ngo bigaragare ko nawe afite ubwo burwayi, n’ibindi
bimenyetso byakabaye bishyigikira iyi raporo bikaba bishidikanywaho nk’uko byagaragajwe
haruguru.
[40] Hashingiwe ku byasobanuwe, Urukiko rw’Ubujurire rurasanga ibimenyetso byose
byashingiweho n’Urukiko Rukuru mu guhamya Ndayambaje Emmanuel icyaha nk’uko
byasesenguwe haruguru, bidahamya mu buryo budashidikanywaho ko yakoze icyaha cyo
gusambanya umwana, bityo hashingiwe ku murongo watanzwe mu manza zavuzwe haruguru no
ku ngingo ya 111 y’Itegeko Nº 027/2019 ryo ku wa 19/09/2019 ryerekeye imiburanishirize
y’imanza z’inshinjabyaha, ivuga ko gushidikanya birengera ushinjwa, ko iyo urubanza
rwakurikiranwe mu buryo bwose ntihagire ibimenyetso nyakuri biboneka byemeza abacamanza
ko ushinjwa yakoze icyaha koko bagomba kwemeza ko atsinze, Ndayambaje Emmanuel agizwe
umwere kubera gushidikanya, bivuze ko imikirize y’urubanza rwajuririwe ihindutse.
III. ICYEMEZO CY’URUKIKO
[41] Rwemeje ko ubujurire bwa Ndayambaje Emmanuel bufite ishingiro;
[42] Rwemeje ko urubanza RPA 01857/2021/HC/KIG rwaciwe n’Urukiko Rukuru ku wa
09/01/2025, ruhindutse;
[43] Rwemeje ko Ndayambaje Emmanuel adahamwa n’icyaha cyo gusambanya umwana yari
akurikiranweho, akaba agomba kurekurwa.
